title: Barbie Advent Calendar with Doll & 24 Surprise Accessories Including Unicorn & 3 Pets, Transform Pink-Haired Fashion Doll into Mermaid, Fairy & More, HRG90
features: Get into the holiday spirit with the Barbie Advent Calendar that gifts fantasy fun with Barbie doll and 24 days of surprises to open!
Day One reveals Barbie doll with long, pink fantasy hair and a versatile look!
Kids can transform Barbie doll into a mermaid, royal or fairy once they discover pieces like the mermaid tail, a long skirt or clip-on wings.
Fantasy friends to find include a mini unicorn figure, adorable puppy and 2 fantastical pets, plus a pet bed!
Additional styling and storytelling accessories include 2 pairs of shoes, a brush, headbands and more -- a large gift box opens and closes to hold pieces and play out more surprises!
A child-sized bracelet with 2 charms adds to the fun for kids as they unbox the items!
Taking imaginations from land to sea to the sky, the Barbie Advent Calendar makes an enchanting holiday gift for kids, especially those who love fantasy!
description: From the manufacturer Dolls & Fashions Barbie dolls, clothes and accessories inspire endless storytelling and styling, encouraging kids to have fun with fashion while imagining everything they can become. Friends, Family & Pets Everyone’s invited to join Barbie doll’s circle of family, friends and pets with dolls and playsets that celebrate their unique personalities and strong bonds. Playsets Design a world for Barbie doll with playsets that include houses, cars, pools, furniture, accessories and so much more to let imaginations explore! Barbie Reveal Barbie Reveal dolls deliver unboxing experiences that delight with features like color-change, plush costumes, scents and other fun transformations. Which doll will you reveal? Careers Inspire young minds to dream big with Barbie Careers dolls and more than 250 professions that capture imaginations and the promise of possibility! Barbie Signature Celebrate moments in time, fashion and popular culture with Barbie collector dolls featuring premium fashions and signature looks, like Holiday Barbie, Día de Muertos dolls, Inspiring Women and more! Be Anything with Barbie With so many possibilities for play, Barbie inspires kids to do anything and be anything!

specifications_table.Included Components: Includes 1 Barbie doll, 1 unicorn figure, 3 pet figures, 1 set of wings, 1 mermaid tail fashion, 2 skirts, 2 pairs of shoes, 3 necklaces, 3 headbands, 6 hairpieces, 1 brush, 1 pet bed, 1 gift box with working lid and 1 child-sized bracelet and 2 charms. Doll cannot stand alone. Colors and decorations may vary.
